title: Van's - Best electrical in town
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Van’s Electrical and Solar was established in 1962 and - for the second consecutive year - a proud winner as Best Electrician in the Best of Mossel Bay Reader’s Choice awards, has ensured the town and surrounding areas of an electrifying stream of excellence ever since!","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Van’s Electrical and Solar was established in 1962 and - for the second consecutive year - a proud winner as Best Electrician in the Best of Mossel Bay Reader’s Choice awards, has ensured the town and surrounding areas of an electrifying stream of excellence ever since!"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Our journey towards this award, with 63 years of experience and adapting with time, boasts the solar division that has been part of our business since 2018."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our workforce consists of construction teams, each made up of an electrician and his assistant. Each team is provided with a vehicle and the required equipment. We also have two maintenance teams doing other electrical work unrelated to electrical installations.","html":"Our workforce consists of construction teams, each made up of an electrician and his assistant. Each team is provided with a vehicle and the required equipment. We also have two maintenance teams doing other electrical work unrelated to electrical installations."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We are a fully qualified company registered with the Electrical Contractors' Association (ECA) of South Africa.","html":"We are a fully qualified company registered with the Electrical Contractors' Association (ECA) of South Africa."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our solar department consists of three dedicated teams for installation and repairs. We operate across the whole Western Cape and as far as Gqeberha in the east. We have already successfully installed systems of 5 KW up to 128KW.","html":"Our solar department consists of three dedicated teams for installation and repairs. We operate across the whole Western Cape and as far as Gqeberha in the east. We have already successfully installed systems of 5 KW up to 128KW."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With a total staff compliment of 61, we boast dedicated teams who strive to sustain our reputation as the best in the market, which we value dearly. We would like to thank each of our staff members, without whom this award would not have been possible.","html":"With a total staff compliment of 61, we boast dedicated teams who strive to sustain our reputation as the best in the market, which we value dearly. We would like to thank each of our staff members, without whom this award would not have been possible."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our clients inspire us. There is nothing as satisfying as finishing a quality job and be rewarded with kind words, gratitude and satisfaction from our clients.","html":"Our clients inspire us. There is nothing as satisfying as finishing a quality job and be rewarded with kind words, gratitude and satisfaction from our clients."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We thank all our clients and those who took the time to vote for us.","html":"We thank all our clients and those who took the time to vote for us."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Without you, we cannot be the best - and thanks to you, this reward encourages us to do even better on our future journey.","html":"Without you, we cannot be the best - and thanks to you, this reward encourages us to do even better on our future journey."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our office hours are from 06:45 to 17:00 weekly. We have a 24-hour service available.","html":"Our office hours are from 06:45 to 17:00 weekly. We have a 24-hour service available."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Marsh street 44, Mossel Bay","html":"Marsh street 44, Mossel Bay"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"071 643 5479 | 044 690 3417","html":"071 643 5479 | 044 690 3417"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"[email protected]","html":"[email protected]"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our office hours are from 06:45 to 17:00 weekly.","html":"Our office hours are from 06:45 to 17:00 weekly. "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
